tools.name: query_buyer_and_related
tools.description: Find the related buyers from a trade order

tools.name: get_fulfillment_status
tools.description: Get the aggregated business status of a fulfillment order

tools.name: get_cancel_scenes
tools.description: Who initiated the cancellation for an order

tools.name: get_cancel_error_code
tools.description: Get the cancellation reason code and message

tools.name: get_error_reason
tools.returns: code and text describing the error

tools.name: get_warehouse_status
tools.description: Get the status of a specific warehouse order.
tools.inputs: A fulfillment order id and a warehouse order id.

tools.name: get_warehouse_error_details
tools.inputs: A fulfillment order id and a warehouse order id.

tasks.name: Cancellation reason + warehouse status
tasks.prompt: For trade order T1001, what was the stated reason for the cancellation of fulfillment order FO2001, and what is the current status of its associated warehouse order WO3001?

good: Provides the full reason for the cancellation
bad: States a cancellation reason without calling the cancellation tools.
Reports the wrong warehouse status/cancellation reason
